chapter_title: Coding of Letters by Their Left and Right Letters

passages.passage_text: Under this pattern each letter of a letter group/word is coded by its left and right letters of English alphabet. Let us consider the coding of ABCD

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'GO' is written as 'FHNP', then how will 'SUN' be written in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'LAP' is coded as 'KMZBQU', then how will 'NOTE' be written in that language? [Syndicate Bank (Clerk) 2011]

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'TOP' is written as 'QONPSU', 'RAP' is written as 'SUZBQS', then how will 'GUN' be coded in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'RAM' is written as 'GSZBLN', 'LOVE' is written as 'KMOPWDF', then how will 'ACT' be written in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'NAME' is written as 'MOZBLNDF', 'PUN' is written as 'OQTYMO', then how will 'TALK' be coded in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain language 'NIL' is written as 'MOHJKM', then how will 'COMB' be written in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'PICK' is coded as 'OQHJBBDL', then how will 'FLAT' be written in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: In a certain code language 'CHAT' is written as 'SUZBGIBD'. How will 'APT' be coded in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: In a certain code language 'PINKY' is coded as 'XZOJLMQJOQ'. How will 'YANDY' be coded in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Coding by Left and Right Letters
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'TRUE' is coded as 'USSOVTFP', then what is the code for 'PRAY' in the same language?
